title: Skill protocol tests require trailing slashes for directory matching
context: Fast verification failed during unit testing because TestSkillProtocolArtifactProducingSkillsRequireEnglish expects skill files to contain the trailing slash for target directories (e.g. 'memory/').
content: When writing or updating Quorum skill Markdown files, ensure that references to directories under language or output rules retain their trailing slashes (e.g., 'memory/' instead of 'memory'). Modifying these to standard text strings will break structural protocol assertions. If touch boundaries forbid Go modifications, the skill text itself must be surgically adjusted to satisfy the tests.
